slides.title: Sleep builds *muscle*
slides.body: Most of your growth happens in deep sleep.

slides.title: Take *rest days*
slides.body: Muscle repairs between sessions, not during.

slides.title: Lower the *stress*
slides.body: High cortisol quietly eats your gains.

slides.title: Feed *recovery*
slides.body: Protein and carbs refill and rebuild.

slides.title: *Deload* sometimes
slides.body: Every 6 to 8 weeks, back off to recover.

slides.title: Recover to *grow*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your sleep, food and training together.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
